objective: Repair inherited Stage 8 quality-gate marker drift that blocks unrelated dependency-security remediation PR #286. Positive claims: STAGE8-MARKER-001 keeps the Stage 8 container scan script aligned with the documented Docker Scout fallback by including the docker scout cves command form and critical/high severity filter; STAGE8-DOC-001 keeps Stage 6/8 documentation aligned with the executable checker by recording the exact voice-manifest JSON marker; STAGE8-SCOPE-001 keeps the fix separate from PR #286 dependency metadata and does not touch PR #284. Negative invariants: no product runtime code, no frontend dependency metadata, no Next downgrade, no provider setup, no paid spend, no issue-closing keywords for #249 or #280, no PR #284 mutation, no broad Stage 8 rework, and no production-readiness claim. Evidence must include old-behavior reproduction of the three marker failures, focused checker validation, make quality, make ci, forced pull-request guardrails, and human-only latest-head approval/merge-message review before merge.
